nasb.text: And return to our neighbors sevenfold into their bosom The reproach with which they have reproached You, O Lord.

esv.text: Return sevenfold into the lap of our neighbors the taunts with which they have taunted you, O Lord!

cnv.text: 主啊！願你把我們鄰國羞辱你的羞辱， 七倍歸還在他們身上。

ccb.text: 主啊，我们的邻邦羞辱你， 求你以七倍的羞辱来报应他们。

csbs.text: 主啊，求你把我们邻国所加给你的羞辱， 七倍归回到他们身上！
